title: noccaea cilicica
intro: Noccaea cilicica, also known as Turkish rock-cress, is a plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Noccaea cilicica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Noccaea cilicica can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
